universe._comment: Reusable price/ADV filter (universe.py) + the T3 discovery SCAN BASKETS (config.universe.themes). Baskets are the curated, version-controlled home of the second-order/VC reasoning (operator authors them, optionally LLM-assisted OUTSIDE the loop): an 'ai_compute' basket carries not just the obvious name but the under-narrated power/grid/copper/cooling/uranium derivatives ('copper-not-rockets'). Discovery scans these for a MOTION/STRUCTURAL trigger; the IV gate decides which are CHEAP now (PREREG §4). The paper loop itself is hand-seeded via themes.json and does NOT read this map.

eligibility._comment: Live option-tradability floor (universe.check_eligibility mode='live'). The convexity loop also runs options_tradability.py for the per-contract bid/ask + OI gate (PREREG_THEMATIC_CONVEXITY §3).

convexity_book._comment: Frozen risk frame — PREREG_THEMATIC_CONVEXITY §5. Operator decisions 2026-05-31; per-cluster cap added by the 2026-06-03 amendment. account_equity is a paper nominal until a broker supplies it. cluster_fraction caps aggregate ENTRY-premium per correlation cluster (a name in <=1 cluster; keyed on a deterministic symbol->cluster map, NEVER a theme/basket label — a label can be LLM-set). 0.02 = 2 full names = 20% of book; graduate to 0.03 only once >=4 clusters are curated (dated re-amendment).

clusters._comment: Correlation-budget partition (PREREG §5 amendment 2026-06-03; curated via the trailing-return correlation diagnostic 2026-06-04), documented BY DRIVER so future names route correctly. ai_capex_power = the AI-datacenter power-demand bet (CEG nuclear-gen + NEE utility + CCJ uranium; FCX dropped — copper datacenter-exposure is a sliver of its demand). RE-EXAMINED 2026-06-04: CCJ-NEE pairwise corr is only 0.045, but that is SPOKE-vs-SPOKE — membership is each name's link to the DRIVER, not whether two spokes co-move; uranium-fuel + utility-delivery + electrical-equipment are different supply-side spokes of ONE AI-power-demand bet (nuclear is a MORE direct AI-power spoke than copper ever was; NEE carries a large UNREGULATED renewables/development arm, not a pure regulated utility); cluster mean 0.40 >> 0.26 universe median = cohesive -> KEPT both. Trim a spoke on tail/catalyst evidence (the FCX pattern), never on a single daily-correlation print. space_defense = defense/space-budget driver; EXTENDED 2026-06-04 with the defense primes LMT/NOC/LHX/RTX (the scan basket already held them, the cluster did not — the diagnostic surfaced them at 0.50-0.68 SHARED-driver, resid~=raw so NOT market beta; KTOS bridged to LHX at 0.52). RKLB is the loosest member (0.38-0.45, still > the 0.26 median; national-security launch shares the driver) — KEPT (conservative over-cluster + tail co-dependence on a defense/geopolitical catalyst), the future-split-on-evidence candidate.

convexity_gate._comment: Frozen IV/cheap-convexity gate — PREREG_THEMATIC_CONVEXITY §4. No historical IV exists (forward-only chains) → cheapness is measured vs the underlying's trailing realized vol (from bars) + the live skew shape. Thresholds changed only by documented operator edit, never to justify a trade.

convexity_exits._comment: Frozen L2 exit rules — PREREG_THEMATIC_CONVEXITY §6a. Deterministic, no LLM (the fast reflex, SPEC §3). profit_take_multiple: close when the mark reaches N× the entry premium. time_stop_dte: close when ≤ N calendar days to expiry (avoid the gamma/theta endgame). Otherwise hold to expiry (venture style → most expire worthless = −premium). profit_take_multiple RAISED 4.0→10.0 on 2026-06-01 (operator-authorized, calibration-cited — see PREREG §6a): 4× clipped the convex tail (p99 ~4.5× vs ~10× uncapped) at ~0 cost to the mean.

kill_rule._comment: Frozen — PREREG_THEMATIC_CONVEXITY §6. Halts NEW entries (not force-close) on either condition. The KILL file/env switch is always-on, separately, every cycle.

council._comment: T2 — the LLM theme-judgment council (SPEC §5, PREREG §2 hard seam). The council only PROPOSES themes; the deterministic gates below still DISPOSE. Conviction is recorded + forward-scored ONLY — it NEVER sizes a position and NEVER overrides a veto. The three roles run across DISTINCT providers for decorrelated debate. Provider SDKs are lazy-imported; `orchestrator.py --demo` (and all tests) use a deterministic FakeRouter needing no keys. enabled=false falls back to the T1 hand-seeded loop (themes.json consumed directly). cost_cap_usd is a GENEROUS PROVISIONAL fail-closed cap while per-cycle cost is being measured — the real ceiling + run cadence are an operator decision AFTER seeing the printed per-cycle ledger. MODEL IDs + prices_per_mtok ($ per million tokens) verified against provider docs 2026-06-01 (Balanced tier); models/prices move fast — re-verify periodically (a stale model id fails closed: SDK error → RouterError → 0 entries). prices_per_mtok keys not currently mapped are kept so the ledger stays accurate if a role is remapped.

discovery._comment: T3 sentinel inflection discovery (weekly L0). DISCOVERS candidates → the council JUDGES → the deterministic gates DISPOSE (hard seam unchanged). The prescreen is a MOTION/STRUCTURAL funnel — it makes NO cheapness/alpha claim (cheapness is the IV gate's job, fresh + authoritative); inflection_score is a FUNNEL ranking, never a tradeable signal (PREREG §2). markers.* are the disjunctive absolute floors (surface iff |momentum|≥mom_floor OR rv_slope≥rv_slope_floor OR a structural event) + the within-basket rank knobs — funnel knobs, NOT a frozen gate. max_scan_names bounds the cold-cache data pass (C1); scan_top_k bounds the LLM framer (PR2). sentinel_max_slots reserves book/slots for hand-seed convictions so auto-traded discoveries can't starve them (load-bearing). framer model is DECORRELATED from the council roles (else the council just ratifies it). cost_cap_usd is a GENEROUS PROVISIONAL fail-closed cap — the real ceiling is an operator decision after seeing the printed per-scan ledger (T2 precedent).

fixed_basket._comment: The no-gate / fixed-basket NULL books (PREREG_FIXED_BASKET_NULL.md) — test the IV GATE itself (the existing real/shadow pair only tests the council). PR2a ships book 3A ('union_nogate'): gate-OFF over the SAME candidate union the shadow book sees, cap-ON, every L1, so shadow−3A is the FSSD null≈signal control on the edge. PR2b adds 3B (whole basket, equal-weight, weekly) + the shares null. Simulated-only, NEVER the broker, fail-soft (a null bug never halts the real cycle). enabled=false disables the no-gate books; the real loop is unaffected.

shares_basket._comment: The SHARES descriptive null (PREREG_FIXED_BASKET_NULL §2/§5, PR2c) — convexity vs LINEAR. An append-only entry log over the option-eligible basket names (weekly L0, motion-derived direction, equal-weight = one unit); signed returns are computed at REPORT time from bars at the horizon set below, with the §6 terminal-event survivorship guard. DESCRIPTIVE only — shown ALONGSIDE the option tails, NEVER scored against them; forward, never a pass-gate. Simulated, NEVER the broker, fail-soft. horizons mirror the calibration tenor sweep (the convex book holds ~250d median, not 180d).

cluster_diagnostic._comment: Report-not-gate cluster-cap curation BACKSTOP (PREREG §5). Trailing-return correlation over the names the system trades/considers; flags co-moving pairs NOT co-clustered so the operator can curate convexity_book.clusters. It NEVER edits the map (hard seam) and NEVER gates a trade. Tuned for SENSITIVITY (a false negative under-protects the cap): union flag max(raw,resid,spearman), top_n SORTED not hard-filtered (the threshold highlights, never drops a near-miss), Pearson treated as a LOWER BOUND on the tail co-dependence a convex book concentrates. window_days matched to the ~250d convex hold (the cap's horizon); residual strips residual_benchmark beta = the shared-driver attribution, NOT the gatekeeper (residual β is noisy on the free feed); min_overlap is the reporting floor — below it a name is invisible, covered instead by the cap's conservative over-cluster default. All PINNED (§7). Read-only over the warm cache (client=None ⇒ no fetch); fail-soft in L0.

execution._comment: Real Alpaca paper order path (broker.AlpacaPaperBroker). SENDING is gated by safety.dry_run: dry_run=true (default) logs the intended order + simulates the fill — nothing is transmitted; dry_run=false actually submits to the PAPER endpoint. cancel_unfilled: at reconcile, cancel a still-resting limit (it re-evaluates next cycle) instead of leaving it open.
